'''Chayka''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] who joined the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. A follower of [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]], Chayka was killed during the [[Ruusan campaign]]

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 1|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 1]] {{1stm}}
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]] {{Mo}}
